name: io.github.francofuji/uncorreotemporal-mcp-server
title: UnCorreoTemporal
description: Temporary email for AI agents: create inboxes, wait for emails, extract OTPs, verify signups.

environmentVariables.name: UCT_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your UnCorreoTemporal API key (get one at https://uncorreotemporal.com). Format: uct_...

environmentVariables.name: UCT_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: API base URL. Defaults to https://uncorreotemporal.com

environmentVariables.name: UCT_MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Transport mode: stdio (default), streamable-http, or sse
